backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining a chemical reaction app with a safe reactions map, a blocked reactions map, and query functions to get all reactions, get by name (with content blocking), and search reactions.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms the old actor state (with a single `reactions` map) into the new actor state shape with separate `safeReactions` and `blockedReactions` maps, initializing both as empty.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented feature IDs (expanded reaction library, safety filter, organic reagents) to their associated source files, components, and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document providing one-sentence summaries of every frontend source file, serving as a quick reference for the purpose and contents of each module in the React app.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base CSS file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes covering background, foreground, card, border, chart, and sidebar color tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the ChemLab Visual app, loading the React app via `/src/main.tsx` and setting a beaker icon as the favicon.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with three routes (Landing `/`, ReactionLibrary `/library`, ExperimentSimulator `/simulator`) all wrapped in the `LabLayout` component.
frontend/src/components/ChemicalEquation: React component that parses a chemical equation string and renders it with styled subscript numbers, colored arrows, and gas/precipitate indicator symbols.
frontend/src/components/EducationalPanel: Displays detailed educational information for a selected reaction including its name, type badge, balanced equation, reactants/products lists, description, and visual effect, with color-coded reaction type styling.
frontend/src/components/LabLayout.tsx: Defines the main layout wrapper for the app, including a sticky header with navigation links (Home, Reactions, Simulator), a logo, and a footer with copyright info.
frontend/src/components/ReactionAnimatio: Renders a canvas-based animated beaker visualization with particle effects (bubbles, fire, foam, etc.) based on a given chemical reaction's visual effect type.
frontend/src/components/ReactionCard.tsx: Displays a clickable card summarizing a chemical reaction, including its name, type badge with color coding, visual effect icon, equation, and reactant/product tags.
frontend/src/components/ReagentShelf.tsx: Renders a scrollable grid of selectable chemical reagent buttons with color-coded vial icons, enforcing a maximum selection count and showing tooltips.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and returns an ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing login/logout state via DFINITY's AuthClient and exposing identity, status flags, and login/clear functions.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides two React Query hooks: `useAllReactions` fetches all reactions from the backend (merging with local data), and `useReactionByName` fetches a single reaction by name with client-side and backend safety filtering.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, configures Tailwind, and defines a dark lab-themed design system using OKLCH CSS custom properties for both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/lib/reactions.ts: Defines a large static `LOCAL_REACTIONS` record containing 40+ named chemical reactions with metadata (reactants, products, equation, type, visual effect, description) and exports a `mergeWithLocalReactions` utility.
frontend/src/lib/safetyFilter.ts: Exports `isContentBlocked` which performs a case-insensitive substring check against a hardcoded list of blocked terms covering explosives, chemical weapons, and other harmful content, plus a standard safety warning message string.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with `QueryClientProvider` and `InternetIdentityProvider` wrappers around the root `App` component.
frontend/src/pages/ExperimentSimulator.t: Interactive experiment page where users select up to two reagents from a shelf, mix them to find a matching reaction, and view the resulting animation and educational panel, with safety blocking and URL-based reaction preloading.
frontend/src/pages/Landing.tsx: Landing page featuring a hero section with navigation CTAs, a feature highlights grid, and a live reaction count pulled from the reactions query.
frontend/src/pages/ReactionLibrary.tsx: React page that displays a searchable, filterable library of chemical reactions with safety filtering to block restricted content and navigation to the simulator on reaction click.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom fonts, lab-specific color tokens, border radii, box shadows, and keyframe animations for the chemistry app's dark-themed UI.
project_state.json: Project state metadata tracking existing features (expanded reaction library, safety filter, organic reagents) and pending feature requests for an advanced chemistry app with safety restrictions.
